problem_statement:
CHALLENGES IN THE PAINTING INDUSTRY
Reducing Risks, Saving Lives: Drones for Safer Wall Painting
Solution: An AI-enabled autonomous drone specifically
designed for painting tall and large surfaces efficiently and safely.
3D MAPPING
• Drones with similar capabilities (e.g., precision flying,
payload delivery) already exist and are commercially
available.
• Advanced simulation allows
for precise modeling of
drone behavior, paint
application, and wall
navigation.
